# UH APEX request counseling application process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Official counseling request route Business and owner information collection Physical address and ZIP/county fields

## When to surface

I want to apply for APEX counseling. How do I request a UH APEX advisor? What does the APEX form ask for?

## Key information

- Organization: UH APEX Accelerator
- Primary geography: UH APEX service area
- Resource type: Counseling request
- Business stage: Operations, Growth
- ## BOSS routing summary
- Use when an eligible user is ready to request UH APEX counseling.
- ## Best-fit user intents

## People and links

- Organizations: APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://apex.uhbauer.org/reg.aspx?center=71011&mode=counsel&subloc=>

## Next handoff

Prepare handoff summary and meeting checklist before sending the official counseling link.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
